# ClearSight Docs

> Documentation for ClearSight — WCAG 2.1 accessibility checker.

## Sections

- User Guide: https://docs.clearsight.pranaygupta.in/user
- Developer Guide: https://docs.clearsight.pranaygupta.in/dev
- References: https://docs.clearsight.pranaygupta.in/reference

## Key pages

- Quick Start: https://docs.clearsight.pranaygupta.in/user/getting-started/quick-start
- Understanding Your Score: https://docs.clearsight.pranaygupta.in/user/results/score
- Self-Hosting: https://docs.clearsight.pranaygupta.in/dev/self-hosting
- API Reference: https://docs.clearsight.pranaygupta.in/dev/api
- Architecture: https://docs.clearsight.pranaygupta.in/dev/architecture

## App

https://clearsight.pranaygupta.in
